blockReason: Visual QA stayed below 95/100 after 3 iterations (best score: 94). Defects: UNJUSTIFIED_DEAD_CANVAS: large empty/white area in the lower middle and upper area below the headline wasting premium candidate attention canvas; NO_CANDIDATE_FACING_HOOK: candidate hook not visually emphasized as the dominant headline; 'BILFINGER SHUTDOWN PROJECT IN SAUDI ARABIA' is present but visually same size as next text lines; IMPROVE_SPACING: tabular blocks and interview date buttons are visually cramped and lack balanced vertical spacing; IMPROVE_CTA: contact phone and email CTA are small and visually subordinate on small mobile screens, phone icon also too small; IMPROVE_CONTRAST: light green check marks on pale green background panel are low contrast and require stronger distinction; Dead canvas above the green top border appears unjustified on Instagram format; IMPROVE_SPACING

defects: UNJUSTIFIED_DEAD_CANVAS: large empty/white area in the lower middle and upper area below the headline wasting premium candidate attention canvas
NO_CANDIDATE_FACING_HOOK: candidate hook not visually emphasized as the dominant headline; 'BILFINGER SHUTDOWN PROJECT IN SAUDI ARABIA' is present but visually same size as next text lines
IMPROVE_SPACING: tabular blocks and interview date buttons are visually cramped and lack balanced vertical spacing
IMPROVE_CTA: contact phone and email CTA are small and visually subordinate on small mobile screens, phone icon also too small
IMPROVE_CONTRAST: light green check marks on pale green background panel are low contrast and require stronger distinction

requiredCorrections.note: Increase vertical spacing around interview date buttons and between job rows for better clarity and less crowding.
Make contact phone and email larger and more prominent with bigger icon to improve mobile visibility.
Use stronger contrast for check marks and highlight panel to improve readability.
Emphasize the candidate-facing hook 'BILFINGER SHUTDOWN PROJECT IN SAUDI ARABIA' as the primary dominant headline.
Reduce dead canvas by redistributing text blocks or adding design elements to fill empty space strategically.

defects: Dead canvas above the green top border appears unjustified on Instagram format

requiredCorrections.note: Reduce the unjustified dead canvas area at the top green border to better utilize the square Instagram canvas.
Increase padding between the salary/benefits highlight box and the interview section to reduce crowding and improve visual separation.
